scope: Codex right-panel Browser plugin, iPhone-style same-origin wrapper.

actions.label: Opened UX audit wrapper in Codex right-panel browser
iPhone frame stayed blank; app iframe document was not inspectable
Stopped click-through because framed app boot failed

findings.title: App does not boot inside the required iPhone audit frame
findings.action: Open same-origin wrapper with iframe target=/
findings.expected: The SubEasy app should render inside the iPhone frame so the safe visual autopilot can click through the mobile UI.
findings.actual: The iPhone screen stayed white. The wrapper DOM contained only the iframe, and the iframe body/html were not accessible to the browser runtime.
findings.recommendation: Allow the audit wrapper to embed same-origin pages by adding an explicit frame-src 'self' directive for local/dev audit pages, or exempt /ux-auditor.html from the global CSP. Keep production frame-ancestor protections separate from local audit tooling.

observations: The wrapper page itself loaded in the Codex right panel.
No browser console logs were exposed through tab.dev.logs for this framed failure.
Response headers for /ux-auditor.html include default-src 'none' and no explicit frame-src directive, which is consistent with iframe loading being blocked by CSP fallback.
